mapper.select: SELECT proc_def_count.def_id_, proc_def_count.key_, MAX(proc_def_count.var_count_) as max_var_count FROM ( SELECT prc.id_, prc.proc_def_id_ as def_id_, COUNT(*) as var_count_, def.key_ FROM act_hi_varinst as var LEFT JOIN act_hi_procinst as prc ON var.proc_inst_id_ = prc.id_ LEFT JOIN act_re_procdef as def ON prc.proc_def_id_ = def.id_ GROUP BY prc.id_, prc.proc_def_id_, def.key_ ) as proc_def_count GROUP BY def_id_, key_
